findings.evidence: Line 71 exposes `theorem comp_productMap`; its normal form rewrites `φ.comp (productMap f₁ f₂)` to `productMap (φ.comp f₁) (φ.comp f₂)`, and line 208 uses it to prove the public simp lemma `mapValue_pointsMulEquiv_symm_apply`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to `comp_productMap`, or make the lemma private if it is only intended as proof scaffolding for `mapValue_pointsMulEquiv_symm_apply`.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.Algebra.TensorProduct.comp_productMap` is a public characteristic lemma for post-composition through `Algebra.TensorProduct.productMap`, but it is not marked `@[simp]`, so users cannot normalize this square without naming the lemma.

summary: The product-points naturality lemmas are now present and the inverse equivalence lemma is marked for simp, but the new public tensor-product naturality helper is missing the same normal-form annotation.
